message:
✨ Add from-main and from-clusters nav perf scenarios (#1094)

Add two dedicated navigation scenarios that test leaving the Main
Dashboard and My Clusters pages. Each scenario returns to the origin
dashboard between navigations to isolate the "leaving a heavy dashboard"
transition — the user-reported pattern of delays when navigating away.

- from-main: 13 navigations from / to various dashboards
- from-clusters: 13 navigations from /clusters to various dashboards

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
